source_title: План дальнейших исследований для v11 — forensic audit of v10
goal: Conduct a rigorous forensic audit of the v10 microstructure overlay result to confirm, downgrade, or reject it as a genuine improvement over the immutable baseline.
global_constraints: v11 is audit-only: no new features, no new directional scouts, no early-cut, no label changes.
Immutable reference is active-signal-v1@1 — never modify the baseline.
All comparisons must use the same lockbox window for base and overlay.
Short-only, long-only, and combined veto must be tested as separate runs — never aggregated into a single story.
Leakage, reference, window, and snapshot audits must complete before any interpretive conclusion.
Simple rule-based overlay must be validated before model-backed overlay.
PROMOTE status is only valid if v10 survives the entire forensic cycle.

stages.title: Freeze and forensic-cycle setup
stages.objective: Lock v11 into audit-only mode, create the audit project, register all open forensic items.
actions: Open a new research_project for v11 audit cycle.
Record in research_record: v10 claimed success, why it needs forensic validation, specific red flags to check.
Pin immutable reference: snapshot_id=active-signal-v1, version=1, symbol=BTCUSDT, anchor=1h, execution=5m.
Define research_map axes: audit_block, side, run_type, leakage_type, comparison_window, final_verdict.

Create open-items register: reference_integrity, window_integrity, feature_leakage_audit, label_leakage_audit, snapshot_assembly_audit, reproduce_v10, same_window_base_runs, short_long_combined_separation, cannibalization_ownership, final_v11_verdict.
success_criteria: Separate v11 audit-project exists with frozen audit-only mode.
All 10 forensic open-items registered in the research map.

stages.title: Exact reproduction of v10 from scratch
stages.objective: Reproduce the full v10 result from clean state without manual adjustments to determine if it is reproducible at all.
actions: Rebuild dataset and micro-core features from scratch.
Recompute baselines: bucket veto and threshold veto.
Rebuild best short and long veto models.
Reassemble overlay snapshot.
Repeat the reported lockbox result exactly.
success_criteria: Reproduction verdict: reproduced exactly / partially reproduced / not reproduced.

stages.title: Reference integrity audit
stages.objective: Resolve the core contradiction: v10 lockbox table referenced @3 as baseline while the plan specified immutable @1.
actions: Inspect and compare active-signal-v1@1 vs active-signal-v1@3: logic, parameters, execution, filters, exits, symbol and window coverage.
If snapshots are not identical: declare v10 comparison invalid and rerun all v10 comparisons strictly against @1.
success_criteria: Clear verdict: @1 == @3, or @1 != @3 with documented diffs.
If mismatch: all prior v10 comparisons flagged as invalid.

stages.title: Window integrity audit
stages.objective: Verify that train, selection-OOS, and lockbox windows are identical across all v10 runs and that lockbox was never peeked at.
actions: Pin exact train / selection-OOS / lockbox window boundaries.
Verify thresholds were selected only on selection-OOS, never on lockbox.
Verify same lockbox window used for base and overlay runs.
Check that window was not shifted between short / long / combined runs.
success_criteria: Window discipline verdict: valid or invalid with specific violations documented.

stages.title: Feature leakage audit
stages.objective: Verify that all micro-features are causally clean with no future information leaking into decision-time features.
actions: For each micro-feature audit: source timeframe, exact aggregation cutoff, future-5m-bar leakage into 1h decision, warmup and null handling, dataset materialization alignment.
Focus on cf_micro_imbalance_1h, cf_micro_close_pressure_1h, cf_micro_shock_cluster_1h.
Run shift test: shift feature +/-1 bar and check if result stays suspiciously good.
Run null-mask sanity: check if feature presence/absence is itself a hidden signal.
Run timestamp audit: manually verify several decision timestamps.
success_criteria: Per-feature leakage verdict: leakage absent / suspicious / confirmed leakage.

stages.title: Label leakage and shortcut audit
stages.objective: Check whether veto models achieved suspiciously high AUC because label construction is near-identical to the strongest feature.
actions: Audit label construction for bad_trade_pnl_balanced, fragile_trade_mae_balanced, bad_trade_composite_balanced.
Measure direct association between label membership and cf_micro_imbalance_1h.
Test for near-direct threshold shortcut between label and single feature.
Run ablations: model with only cf_micro_imbalance_1h, model without it, model with shuffled labels, model with shuffled feature.
success_criteria: Label verdict: labels valid / labels too shortcut-prone / labels invalid.

stages.title: Snapshot assembly audit
stages.objective: Verify that the veto overlay was integrated causally — no retroactive trade blocking or mixed long/short logic.
actions: Inspect overlay snapshot assembly logic step by step.
Verify when veto decision is computed and which feature value is available at decision moment.
Confirm no retroactive blocking of already-opened trades.
Confirm no mixed logic between long and short veto paths.
Audit separately: short-only snapshot, long-only snapshot, combined snapshot.
success_criteria: Causal verdict per snapshot variant: decision timing OK, causal blocking OK, side isolation OK, no mixed logic.

stages.title: Same-window matched reruns
stages.objective: Run immutable base and all overlay variants on the identical lockbox window to produce an unambiguous comparison.
actions: Run immutable base @1 on lockbox window.
Run short-only veto overlay over base on same lockbox window.
Run long-only veto overlay over base on same lockbox window.
Run combined veto overlay over base on same lockbox window.
For each run compute: trades, net PnL, PF, DD, win rate, removed trades, removed winners.
success_criteria: Matched same-window comparison table with all four routes completed and metrics computed.

stages.title: Cannibalization and ownership audit
stages.objective: Prove the overlay genuinely improves the system by removing bad trades, not by masking problems or destroying profitable coverage.
actions: For short-only, long-only, combined: list removed trades, PnL of removed trades, share of removed losers vs winners, which side benefited more.
Check weak-window repair and regime-specific coverage loss.
Verify overlay does not kill strong profitable clusters.
Compute ownership: improvement driven by removing bad trades vs hidden interaction with base mechanics.
success_criteria: Ownership/cannibalization verdict per route with quantified removed-loser share, removed-winner share, and coverage-loss risk.

stages.title: Negative controls and robustness
stages.objective: Stress-test the overlay result with placebo thresholds, perturbations, time-slice splits, and cross-side misapplication to rule out random-artifact fit.
actions: Placebo thresholds: slightly worse, slightly better, and opposite-side thresholds.
Small perturbation test: threshold +/- epsilon.
Time-slice robustness: first half of lockbox vs second half.
Side-perturbation: apply long threshold to short side and vice versa.
success_criteria: Robustness verdict per test: result is stable across perturbations, or fragile with specific break-points documented.

stages.title: Final v11 forensic verdict
stages.objective: Render the final forensic verdict on the v10 microstructure overlay: CONFIRMED, DOWNGRADED TO WATCHLIST, or REJECTED.
actions: Aggregate all audit findings across stages 2–10.

Classify outcome: CONFIRMED (reproducible, no leakage, overlay genuinely improves base), DOWNGRADED TO WATCHLIST (signal alive but fragile or methodologically weak), or REJECTED (leakage found, reference mismatched, non-reproducible, or improvement vanishes on honest rerun).
Record final verdict in research_record and update research_map.
If CONFIRMED: mark PROMOTE status as validated.
If DOWNGRADED or REJECTED: document specific failure reasons and recommended next steps.
Send final verdict notification.
success_criteria: Final forensic verdict recorded with full justification chain.
stages.gate_hint: If any earlier audit stage yields a definitive REJECTED finding (e.g. confirmed leakage or non-reproducibility), this stage still runs but may fast-path to REJECTED verdict.

warnings: Plan is written in Russian; stage titles and objectives translated to English for semantic consistency.
v10 reported suspiciously high veto-model AUC/PR (~0.95) and identical delta across short/long/combined — primary red flags driving this audit.
